hero.title: Manage your academy the
hero.description: The all-in-one platform to manage classes, teachers, rooms, payments, and bookings for your academy.

features.title: Everything you need in one place
features.subtitle: Powerful tools designed for modern educational management

users.title: User Management
users.description: Full role control: administrators, teachers, and students with hierarchical permissions.

bookings.title: Smart Bookings
bookings.description: Booking system with automatic schedule, capacity, and availability validation.

packages.title: Flexible Packages
packages.description: Create and manage educational packages with pricing, discounts, and hour tracking.

payments.title: Secure Payments
payments.description: Complete payment flow with receipts, administrative approval, and auditing.

rooms.title: Room Management
rooms.description: Manage physical rooms with real-time capacity control and availability.

availability.title: Teacher Availability
availability.description: Teachers manage their weekly schedule with automatic overlap validation.

howItWorks.title: How does it work?
howItWorks.subtitle: Four simple steps to transform your academy management

1.title: Register your team
1.description: Administrators create accounts for teachers and students.

2.title: Set up your offerings
2.description: Define educational packages, rooms, and available schedules.

3.title: Students book classes
3.description: Students purchase packages and book their classes.

4.title: Manage and grow
4.description: Monitor payments, occupancy, and performance from the dashboard.

footer.description: The comprehensive platform for smart management of academies and educational centers.
